title: Monster Mugshots
short_description: Study the monster police lineup, then answer from memory — who wore the top hat? Who held the umbrella? Train your memory like a detective.
description: Welcome to the Monster Police! A lineup of silly suspects appears, each with its own accessories — top hats, sunglasses, umbrellas, crowns. Study them carefully, because they'll hide, and then you must answer from memory: which monster was wearing the hat? Who was holding the balloon? It's a detective-themed workout for memory and attention to detail. Grade bands ramp from three monsters with a long look, to four monsters, to five monsters and more accessories with only a quick peek. A free online memory and observation game for kids in grades 1–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Study the lineup, then tap the monster that matches the question from memory.
